last_episode_to_air.name: Down to the Fire
last_episode_to_air.overview: The survivalists face torrential rainstorms and then must make primitive fire to stay in the competition. The grueling challenge pushes even the most tested past their breaking point. In a neck-and-neck battle, the winner is crowned.

name: Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
original_name: Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
overview: Winner takes all as 12 all-star Naked and Afraid survivalists battle to take home $100,000 and be crowned the Last One Standing in a head-to-head, multiphase challenge.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: For the first time ever, survivalists will compete head-to-head through a grueling, multiphase challenge and have their primitive skills tested for the chance to win $100,000. The competition is fierce, as survivalists can use any means necessary – even sabotage – to take home the grand prize. At the end of 45 days, only one can be crowned the Last One Standing.

episodes.name: Making Enemies Fast
episodes.overview: Naked and Afraid's most skilled compete for $100,000 and to be crowned the franchise's best. Starting with no tools, they scramble to prep for a brutal storm and two competitors are at risk immediately. A cutthroat survivalist puts the others on notice.

episodes.name: Cache Me If You Can
episodes.overview: As competitors rush to find cached items, Matt races to grab the bow before Jeff. A grueling migration features head-to-head tests of survival skills. A group forms to stop Jeff from finding more items. A survivalist plots to sabotage two competitors.

episodes.name: Africa's Most Dangerous Snakes
episodes.overview: A deadly snake could take Matt out of the challenge – or become lunch. Survivalists' tracking skills are tested as they scramble to recover the remaining caches before their competition. Gary and Waz hatch a plan to coax Stacey into sending Jeff home.

episodes.name: More Hides Than Friends
episodes.overview: Competitors battle for new resources in a grueling migration across punishing, elevated terrain. An injury puts Matt's challenge at risk. Waz unleashes a game-changing response to Jeff's cutthroat strategy. Two survivalists exit the challenge.

episodes.name: Mo Honey, Mo Problems
episodes.overview: Gary and Dan take on a swarm of killer bees to chase a big food win. Fighting an injury, Matt is forced to adapt and chase small prey. Exhausted and hungry, Cheeny is on the brink. The challenge is upended as pairs are split and new factions are formed.

episodes.name: Burned and On Notice
episodes.overview: With competitors split into camps, simmering tensions come to a boil; Matt scores a meat win; Gary tries a dangerous climb to secure a critical cache; Jeff spirals after cutting his hand, burning his foot and facing backlash from the others.

episodes.name: Cutthroat to the Bone
episodes.overview: Desperate for a kill, Matt lays down new hunting ground rules. Gary confronts Steven and Waz when a honey score might be stolen. In the first elimination challenge, a cold-blooded move creates head-to-head conflict. Two survivalists leave the challenge.

episodes.name: Class Three Warfare
episodes.overview: A serious leg injury puts Matt’s challenge in jeopardy. During a dangerous white-water migration, the survivalists and their rafts are battered. Tempers flare, and Gary squares off with Matt and Waz. New camp dynamics shake up the competition.

episodes.name: Legendary Showdown
episodes.overview: Two bitter rivals go head-to-head in a multi-step water and bushcraft elimination. Steven uses his tracking skills and out-strategizes Jeff to secure a critical cache. Gary forages a huge protein score. One survivalist is eliminated from the competition.

episodes.name: Down to the Fire
episodes.overview: The survivalists face torrential rainstorms and then must make primitive fire to stay in the competition. The grueling challenge pushes even the most tested past their breaking point. In a neck-and-neck battle, the winner is crowned.

1.name: Season 1

The competition is fierce, as survivalists can use any means necessary – even sabotage – to take home the grand prize. At the end of 45 days, only one can be crowned the Last One Standing.
